entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop (Pennisetum glaucum) grown in semi-arid tropics.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET RUST
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting pearl millet caused by Puccinia sp.

entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for causing rust in pearl millet.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographic region where the status of pearl millet rust is reviewed.

entities.name: GEOGRAPHIC DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The spatial spread and occurrence of pearl millet rust.

entities.name: ECONOMIC IMPORTANCE
entities.description: The financial and agricultural impact of pearl millet rust.

entities.name: PATHOGEN CHARACTERISTICS
entities.description: The biological and physical traits of Puccinia sp.

entities.name: HOST RANGE
entities.description: The variety of host plants that Puccinia sp. can infect.

entities.name: CONTROL METHODS
entities.description: Strategies and techniques used to manage or eliminate pearl millet rust.
